name: Black Bean Tortilla Melt
recipeIngredient: 15 oz can black beans, rinsed and drained
2 (4 oz) cans chopped green chiles, undrained
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
Mash the beans; add chili powder and stir well. Spread about three tablespoons of bean mixture on each tortilla. Sprinkle with cilantro and squeeze one lime wedge over each. Top each tortilla with two tablespoons of green chiles and two tablespoons of cheese. Bake at 450°F for 3 to 5 minutes or until the cheese melts. Serve with fresh salsa.
